member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.FileExistsActionEnum
member.summary: Actions if the output document already exists.

member.name: F:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.FileExistsActionEnum.Error
member.summary: Throw error.

member.name: F:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.FileExistsActionEnum.Overwrite
member.summary: Overwrite the existing document.

member.name: F:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.FileExistsActionEnum.Rename
member.summary: Rename the new document.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.PageSizeEnum
member.summary: Page size options.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.PageOrientationEnum
member.summary: Options for page orientation.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Error
member.summary: Error that occurred during the task.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Error.Message
member.summary: Summary of the error.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Error.AdditionalInfo
member.summary: Additional information about the error.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Input
member.summary: Essential parameters.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Input.InputBase64
member.summary: Base64 encoded binary data of the file to scale.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Input.Size
member.summary: Document page size to which to scale.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Input.OnlyScaleDown
member.summary: If true, the file will only be scaled down in size. If any pages are smaller than the target size, they will be left unchanged. If false, all pages will be scaled to fit the target size.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Options
member.summary: Additional parameters.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Options.FileExistsAction
member.summary: What to do if destination file already exists.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Options.ThrowErrorOnFailure
member.summary: Whether to throw an error on failure.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Options.ErrorMessageOnFailure
member.summary: Overrides the error message on failure.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Result
member.summary: Result of the task.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Result.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the task completed successfully.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Result.ResultBase64
member.summary: Base 64 binary of the scaled PDF file.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Definitions.Result.Error
member.summary: Error that occurred during task execution.
member.example: object { string Message, object { Exception AdditionalInfo } }

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Pdf
member.summary: Creates a new scaled PDF file from a given source PDF file. Each page of the source PDF is scaled to fit inside the target size while maintaining the aspect ratio. The output PDF will have the same number of pages as the source, but each page will be resized in either portrait or landscape orientation depending on the original page orientation.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Helpers.ErrorHandler
member.summary: Handles error with usage of a standard ThrowOnFailure Frends flag

member.name: M:Frends.Pdf.ScaleDocument.Helpers.ErrorHandler.Handle(System.Exception,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Handler for exceptions
member.param: Message to throw in error event
member.returns: Throw exception if a flag is true, else return Result with Error info
